description: Recto: Booklist in Arabic script listing individual Epistles (of the Brethren of Purity) that have been copied and bound and into how many majallāt and karārīs, including risālat al-ʿadad, risālat al-akhlāq, al-ārā' wa-l-madhāhib, and al-ṭarīq ilā Allāh. Verso: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. ASE.
tags: book trade, Arabic script, Ikhwan al-Safa
description_he: צד א': רשימת ספרים בכתב ערבי הכוללת אגרות בודדות של 'אחים הטהורים'; צד ב': חשבונות ביהודית-ערבית
